text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(The truth is, I originally had plans here at the Mejiro estate during
these dates. They excused me, but... I'll make it up to them next
time.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I won't regret going, though. Taiki's been crying quietly to herself
every night. I had to do something.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What's this? It has "To Dober" written on it. A present and a letter?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's from Ryan. I wonder what this is about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
"I bet you're worried about missing our plans for the camping trip, so
thought I'd write to you! Don't worry about it, seriously. I'm actually
happy you're going."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
"You noticed your friend was struggling and reached out a hand to
her. I'm proud of you!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
"Although you're reserved, you're observant and thoughtful. You may
not realize it, but that makes you someone people can rely on."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
"So... be confident in your decision and go out there and have a blast!
Hopefully this outfit I picked for you will help!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan... Thank you. Hehe, I wonder what clothes she picked... Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, Ryan went overboard with this outfit! I never usually wear
anything that shows so much of my back!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(But... Okay, I'll give it a chance. Ryan wanted me to wear it with
confidence.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Instead of staying in my shell like always, I'll be bold! And make sure
Taiki makes some wonderful memories!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
So, to recap, in order to find the Dreamstone, we'll have to find two
hidden clues first.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
One is hidden somewhere along the river that runs from the north to
southwest of the campsite. It's called the Lonely River in the movie.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The other one is hidden deep in the forest behind the barbecue area.
It's called Ghillie Dhu's Garden.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Once we've made it past all the traps in each area and acquired the
two gemstones, we'll head to the rocky beach area.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oberon's Palace. This cave is where the Dreamstone lies!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
If we can open the door to the cave with the two stones we acquired,
then we might just find the Dreamstone inside!

text_block_list.name: All
text_block_list.text: Oooh!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The Lonely River and Ghillie Dhu's Garden... Hehe, sounds like it
came straight from a storybook!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well then, let's start by heading to the Lonely River for the first
stone!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look, Dober! I saw a red mushroom like that in a picture book
once!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: This tree over here looks like it has a face on it! Amazing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: AAAH! The roots are shaped like a person's body!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: A Tree Man? A mandrake?! Where, where?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Dearie me. Don't go off too far!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm glad they're enjoying themselves.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
According to the story, there is a sacred spring nearby where an
undine dwells.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Looking at the map, though... it seems they weren't able to reproduce
the spring here, understandably...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wooow! Look at that!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Dober! Rob Roy! There's a stunning spring over here!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: What? C-could it be the undine's spring?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it! I knew the terrain was similar, but I didn't expect it
to be this accurate!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You can't see her, but the undine might be somewhere in there too!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: D-do you think?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If you listen carefully, you can almost hear singing and dancing... Or
at least, that's kind of what it sounds like to me.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I can almost hear it, kind of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Haha! Good! I got a real happy shot of us just now!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me for getting overexcited...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy, tell us more! What else do they have here? Like... a witch's
house or something?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, there's the river where the kelpie lives, and the blue cave
where the fairy king lives. They should be here somewhere!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: The story of Rhodonite is so expansive, there's bound to be lots more to enjoy here!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: WOOO! So the adventure's only just gettin' started! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What a relief. Taiki looks like she's having a great time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to see her having fun all the time... Well, I've got to start being
more proactive too!
